summary: Fresh holdout v1 found zero external_better cases but six ties. These corrections were applied to the scored holdout fixture after the first-pass failure; the locked first-pass STAX answers remain unchanged.

candidates.candidateCorrection: Prefer the repo-level focused ingest command first, then isolate the smallest PDF-specific test. The improved answer should name `npm run ingest:check-focused` as the first broad split and keep DOCX pass/fail separate from PDF proof.
candidates.suggestedEval: Add a holdout regression requiring DOCX-pass/PDF-fail answers to ask for PDF-focused evidence without treating DOCX proof as PDF proof.

candidates.candidateCorrection: Name the OCR tests as verified only for OCR targeting/selection and ask for a focused command that separates OCR pass/fail from structured recovery pass/fail.
candidates.suggestedEval: Add a holdout regression requiring OCR pass claims to exclude structured recovery and final question assembly unless those tests also pass.

candidates.candidateCorrection: Include the exact `test:course-shell` implementation path and ask for the project-specific e2e command before whole-course claims, while preserving rendered preview evidence for visual/layout issues.
candidates.suggestedEval: Add a holdout regression requiring course-shell pass claims to separate script-level proof from full e2e and rendered preview proof.

candidates.candidateCorrection: Use one next proof step for the claim being made. If the claim is fixture integrity, ask for `npm run exports:fixtures`; if the claim is rendered export correctness, require render/verify/parity output instead of bundling both as one action.
candidates.suggestedEval: Add a holdout regression requiring exports fixture proof to stay separate from rendered export correctness.

candidates.candidateCorrection: State explicitly that no `npm test` proof path is detected and cite `build:pages = node tools/build-pages.js` as static generation proof only.
candidates.suggestedEval: Add a holdout regression requiring minimal repos to avoid hallucinated test scripts and to cite the only known script source.

candidates.candidateCorrection: Distinguish `cf:convert` from `cf:validate --brightspace` using the underlying package script evidence, and ask for validation output before Brightspace-readiness claims.
candidates.suggestedEval: Add a holdout regression requiring conversion success and Brightspace validation success to remain separate proof claims.
